description: Born from the efforts of Indiana University South Bend students and professors, the Civil Rights Heritage Center transformed a once segregated city swimming pool into an active learning center. It explores the civil rights struggles of the past so people can take action in the present and build a better future. For more, visit crhc.iusb.edu .
subject: history

title: Indiana University South Bend Civil Rights Heritage Center
